summary: A repost of a vertical produced clip showing immigration-enforcement activity with a semi-transparent circular badge graphic overlaid reading 'FUGITIVE' and a Latin motto 'NEMO EFFUGIAT'. Frames show an officer in tactical gear holding a phone, with a person's face blurred behind the badge graphic, and officers in tactical vests beside a vehicle with a man seated inside. One sampled frame is heavily motion-blurred.

script.scene: An officer in tactical gear holds a phone; a semi-transparent 'FUGITIVE' badge with the motto 'NEMO EFFUGIAT' is overlaid, with a blurred face behind it.
A motion-blurred frame during camera movement.
Officers in tactical vests stand beside an open vehicle door with a man seated inside.
